text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital and I are hashing out<n>our plans for
the future, when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, I'm fine! My head just hurts<n>a little.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I've got the worstwriter's block right now. Like, I can'tdecide what to do for my next fic atall.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You see, I happened across two<n>Umamusume at
the infirmary earlier...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The older student carried the younger<n>one in her
arms! And they were alone<n>in the infirmary, just
the two of<n>them—the younger one whimpering
weakly while the other one comforted<n>her...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But as soon as I begin thinking of the<n>many ways
that scene could develop<n>I—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gyah... owwwww! There it goes<n>again, the second
I start<n>daydreaming...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
So she's got headaches from... an<n>overworked
imagination? I have no<n>idea how that works, but it
ends up<n>bothering her for the rest of the day.
